claude_log_tail: Triple-check verdict: REVISE TO KEEP. Prior DROP was correct that the canonical patch was broken (strings import removed but strings.Join still used at lifecycle.go:280, plus tool_replay reconstruction warnings showed op[16] and op[20] failed to apply). Both rescue paths applied: (1) replaced canonical patch with the full upstream commit ade9120be74ccc4f75942ed8fe06637b80e93b30 fetched from github.com/entireio/cli; (2) replaced go-test-based test.sh with a behavioral grep/AST verifier matching the existing test_manifest.yaml gates. Smoking-gun validation against base commit 1d76de91: buggy=0.0, patched=1.0, stub-gaming<=0.25.

fixes_applied: Replaced canonical_patches/2f5833ec-423b-47b4-9535-556896507b53.json patch with full upstream commit ade9120be74ccc4f75942ed8fe06637b80e93b30 (53690 bytes, 20 files) fetched from github.com/entireio/cli — the original tool_replay reconstruction had only 4 files and dropped 2 critical ops
Rewrote tests/test.sh as behavioral grep/AST verifier consuming the existing test_manifest.yaml gates (G1-G3 gold @ 0.45, S1-S4 silver @ 0.35, B1-B4 bronze @ 0.20)
Updated test_manifest.yaml: removed unimplemented P2P2_unit_tests gate; tagged P2P1_build as informational-only per CLAUDE.md convention

validation_evidence.patch_apply_check: git apply --check returns 0 against base commit 1d76de91
validation_evidence.lifecycle_strings_join_after_patch: no occurrences (clean removal of both import and usage)

curator_log.notes: Original verdict was correct on the symptom — applying the previous canonical patch produced a Go compile error because tool_replay's regex-based reconstruction failed to match the multi-line strings.Join block (recorded as 'op[16] edit: old text not found' in _reconstruction_warnings) and similarly missed an op in manual_commit_hooks.go. The clean rescue is to fetch the actual upstream commit (ade9120b, parent matches our _base_commit 1d76de91 exactly) which contains 20 file changes vs the 4 captured by tool_replay — including the full lifecycle.go rewrite with the strings.Join removal. The test_manifest.yaml gates were already well-designed but unconnected to the existing test.sh (which used install_config.json with empty FAIL_TO_PASS); the new test.sh wires them in via grep/AST checks against the source tree. Each gate maps to a real, observable change in the upstream diff. Verified gaming resistance: a partial-stub solution that only renames FirstPrompt->LastPrompt scores 0.05; a stub that does all four bronze structural changes without the behavioral gold/silver work scores 0.25 — well below the 0.7 fix threshold.
